note: Service-invocation specs (I2): HOW the conductor calls each organ. Specs, not code — the organ repos are untouched. `spend: gated` organs NEVER spawn without --approve <organ> (constitution #4 — fail-closed); any unknown spend value also fails closed. `root_id` = the registry organ whose repo the command runs in. Optional `local_dir` overrides the derived repo-basename directory when the local checkout's name/casing differs (e.g. repo skill-clusters → dir Skill-clusters), needed on case-sensitive filesystems; `CAMBIUM_ORGAN_ROOTS` env (JSON map) overrides both. {tenant}/{input} are substituted at build time; {input} falls back to input_default.

taste.spend_reason: embeds the request via the paid NIM cortex (needs NVIDIA_API_KEY)

genesis.spend_reason: runs the full brand-mint waves (visual + inference generation)

hands.spend_reason: resolve-task is a deterministic resolver (tasks.md → cluster dispatch plan); NO spend. The spend-bearing part is DISPATCHING the resolved cluster orchestrators — a gated extension, not this adapter.

will.spend_reason: brand_to_gtm drives PAID Explee search/enrich via the explee-proxy (needs an APPROVED Brief + EXPLEE_PROXY_TOKEN); constitution #4
will.note: brand_to_gtm exists as a gated library fn (scripts/lib/gtm.py); the thin scripts/gtm_cli.py CLI wrapper is the snow-gloves follow-up — the function + the approval gate are already there.
